globals.name: cultivating_change_talk
globals.justification: The assistant masterfully evoked, deepened, and reinforced change talk throughout the session, encouraging the user to explore their own reasons for wanting to change and to consider what it would mean to show up at the wedding as their genuine self, flaws and all.

globals.name: softening_sustain_talk
globals.justification: The assistant skillfully de-escalated sustain talk and surfaced the underlying ambivalence without confrontation, reflecting the user's fears and concerns without arguing against them and instead helping the user to explore their own motivations and desires.

globals.name: partnership
globals.justification: The assistant actively fostered an equal partnership, inviting the user's expertise and insight, and allowing the user to set the pace and direction of the conversation, creating a collaborative and supportive environment.

globals.name: empathy
globals.justification: The assistant demonstrated a deep, nuanced understanding of the user's perspective and inner world, naming feelings and meanings that the user had not yet articulated, and providing a safe and supportive space for the user to explore their thoughts and emotions.
